title: elymus intramongolicus
intro: Elymus intramongolicus, also known as Tu Fu Ling, is a type of plant in the Poaceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its saponins and flavonoids content, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tu Fu Ling include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, Tu Fu Ling is often dried and used as a decoction, or combined with other herbs to create a tea or tonic, promoting its medicinal properties and health benefits.
